reforms.description: The tax reform includes provisions that require PEMEX to allocate funds for research and modernization, enhancing its operational efficiency and technological capabilities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The allocation of funds for research and modernization is expected to enhance technological capabilities and operational efficiency, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into effect as part of the tax reform package.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how PEMEX allocates funds for R&D, indicating a major shift in policy.
reforms.source_quote: The company has to carry out a program to improve operating efficiency to international standards and funds must be spent on research and modernization rather than on current expenses.

reforms.description: A comprehensive public finance reform was submitted to Congress in June 2007, aiming to strengthen tax administration, improve spending efficiency through systematic impact evaluation, and reduce dependence on oil revenue, while also emphasizing the need for reforms to promote within-firm productivity growth and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to enhance productivity and innovation within firms, which is expected to lead to improved economic efficiency and growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform was submitted to Congress but has not yet been implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of public finance and innovation policy, indicating a major shift in approach.
reforms.source_quote: The government submitted to Congress in June 2007 a comprehensive public finance reform, which includes four main pillars.

reforms.description: The government assists small firms in developing linkages with large firms through the Supplier Development Programme (SDP), which has helped form strategic alliances between large foreign firms and SME suppliers.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating linkages between small and large firms, the programme enhances the capacity of SMEs to innovate and commercialize their products, contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme is currently operational and assisting SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the programme is more focused and does not represent a systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: The government assists small firms in developing linkages with large firms, in particular through the Supplier Development Programme (SDP).

reforms.description: In February 2007, Mexico and the United States agreed to launch a pilot programme allowing trucks from both countries to cross the border, involving 100 companies that meet safety and licensing standards.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This programme is expected to facilitate trade and logistics, thereby supporting the growth of innovative firms involved in cross-border activities.
reforms.status_evidence: The pilot programme was agreed upon but has not yet been fully implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The agreement represents a significant policy change in cross-border trade and logistics.
reforms.source_quote: An important step forward was made in February 2007, with Mexico and the United States agreeing to launch a pilot programme to allow trucks from both countries to cross the border.

reforms.description: Several initiatives were launched to enhance human capital for innovation, including a programme to lower the cost of first employment for young workers, the establishment of the National Council of Education for Life and Work (CONEVyT) to oversee adult learning policies, and the expansion of training support programmes for SMEs to improve their technological capabilities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives aim to improve the skills and capabilities of the workforce, which is essential for fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: All initiatives have been launched and are currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While these initiatives are significant, they are more focused and do not represent a systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: The Programme for Training and Strengthening SME capabilities aims at upgrading entrepreneurial competences in management, administration and marketing to allow a wider and deeper absorption of new technologies.
